templates.title: Total customers
templates.description: Count all active (non-deleted) customers in the bank.
examples: How many customers are there in total?
How big is the customer base?
templates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers
FROM fin.customers
WHERE is_deleted = false
LIMIT 1
templates.summary_hint: State the total number of customers.

templates.title: Total transaction volume
templates.description: Total value of completed outgoing (debit) transactions — overall spend.
examples: What is the total transaction volume?
How much money was spent in total?
templates.sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_volume,
       COUNT(*) AS transactions
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
  AND direction = 'debit'
  AND status = 'completed'
LIMIT 1
templates.summary_hint: Report the total transaction volume and how many transactions it covers.

templates.title: Transaction volume by month
templates.description: Monthly completed transaction volume and count over time.
examples: How has spend changed over time?
templates.sql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_volume,
       COUNT(*) AS transactions
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
  AND status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 36
templates.summary_hint: Describe the monthly trend in transaction volume.

templates.title: Top merchant categories by spend
templates.description: Spend grouped by merchant category, highest first.
examples: Which categories do customers spend the most on?
templates.sql:
SELECT mc.name AS category,
       ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS total_spend,
       COUNT(*) AS transactions
FROM fin.transactions t
JOIN fin.merchants m ON m.id = t.merchant_id
JOIN fin.merchant_categories mc ON mc.id = m.category_id
WHERE t.is_deleted = false
  AND t.direction = 'debit'
  AND t.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 12
templates.summary_hint: Highlight the top spending categories.

templates.title: Fraud rate by channel
templates.description: Share of transactions flagged as fraud, by transaction channel.
examples: Which channel has the most fraud?
How risky is online vs POS?
templates.sql:
SELECT channel,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_fraud) AS fraud_count,
       COUNT(*) AS total,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_fraud) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS fraud_rate_pct
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY fraud_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Point out which channels carry the highest fraud rate.

templates.title: Fraud transactions by month
templates.description: Count and value of fraudulent transactions over time.
templates.sql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_fraud) AS fraud_transactions,
       ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE is_fraud), 0), 2) AS fraud_amount
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 36
templates.summary_hint: Describe how fraud volume changes month to month.

templates.title: New customers by month
templates.description: Customer sign-ups grouped by month.
examples: How many customers join each month?
templates.sql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(*) AS new_customers
FROM fin.customers
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 36
templates.summary_hint: Describe the customer acquisition trend.

templates.title: Average balance by customer segment
templates.description: Average active-account balance for each customer segment.
examples: Which segment holds the most money?
Average account balance per customer type
templates.sql:
SELECT c.segment,
       ROUND(AVG(a.balance), 2) AS avg_balance,
       COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS accounts
FROM fin.accounts a
JOIN fin.customers c ON c.id = a.customer_id
WHERE a.is_deleted = false
  AND c.is_deleted = false
  AND a.status = 'active'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY avg_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Compare average balances across segments.

templates.title: Loan default rate by product
templates.description: Share of loans in default, by loan product.
templates.sql:
SELECT product,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'defaulted') AS defaulted,
       COUNT(*) AS total_loans,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'defaulted') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS default_rate_pct
FROM fin.loans
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY default_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Highlight which loan products carry the highest default rate.

templates.title: Loan portfolio by product
templates.description: Outstanding loan principal grouped by product.
examples: How big is each loan product?
templates.sql:
SELECT product,
       ROUND(SUM(principal), 2) AS portfolio,
       COUNT(*) AS loans
FROM fin.loans
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY portfolio DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Describe the size of each loan product in the portfolio.

templates.title: Top customers by spend
templates.description: Customers ranked by total completed spend.
templates.sql:
SELECT c.full_name AS customer,
       c.segment,
       ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS total_spend,
       COUNT(*) AS transactions
FROM fin.transactions t
JOIN fin.accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN fin.customers c ON c.id = a.customer_id
WHERE t.is_deleted = false
  AND t.direction = 'debit'
  AND t.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name, c.segment
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Name the top customers and their spend.

templates.title: Top merchants by spend
templates.description: Merchants ranked by total completed spend.
examples: Which merchants get the most money?
templates.sql:
SELECT m.name AS merchant,
       mc.name AS category,
       ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS total_spend
FROM fin.transactions t
JOIN fin.merchants m ON m.id = t.merchant_id
JOIN fin.merchant_categories mc ON mc.id = m.category_id
WHERE t.is_deleted = false
  AND t.direction = 'debit'
  AND t.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY m.id, m.name, mc.name
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 15
templates.summary_hint: List the top merchants by spend.

templates.title: Cards by network
templates.description: Number of issued cards by card network.
examples: How many Visa vs Mastercard cards?
templates.sql:
SELECT network,
       COUNT(*) AS cards
FROM fin.cards
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cards DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Describe the split of cards across networks.

templates.title: Failed transactions by month
templates.description: Count of failed transactions over time.
examples: How many payments fail each month?
templates.sql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(*) AS failed_transactions
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
  AND status = 'failed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 36
templates.summary_hint: Describe the trend in failed transactions.

templates.title: Transactions by channel
templates.description: Completed transaction count and value by channel.
examples: How do people pay (POS, online, ATM)?
templates.sql:
SELECT channel,
       COUNT(*) AS transactions,
       ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount
FROM fin.transactions
WHERE is_deleted = false
  AND status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY transactions DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Compare transaction activity across channels.

templates.title: Accounts by type
templates.description: Number of accounts by account type.
examples: How many checking vs savings accounts?
templates.sql:
SELECT account_type,
       COUNT(*) AS accounts
FROM fin.accounts
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY accounts DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Describe the mix of account types.

templates.title: Customers by segment
templates.description: Number of customers in each segment.
examples: How many premium vs retail customers?
templates.sql:
SELECT segment,
       COUNT(*) AS customers
FROM fin.customers
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY customers DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Describe how customers split across segments.

templates.title: Support tickets by status
templates.description: Number of support tickets grouped by status.
examples: How many open vs resolved tickets?
templates.sql:
SELECT status,
       COUNT(*) AS tickets
FROM fin.support_tickets
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY tickets DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Summarize the support ticket queue by status.

templates.title: Support tickets by category
templates.description: Number of support tickets grouped by category.
examples: What do customers contact support about?
templates.sql:
SELECT category,
       COUNT(*) AS tickets
FROM fin.support_tickets
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY tickets DESC
LIMIT 10
templates.summary_hint: Highlight the most common support categories.

templates.title: Monthly active customers
templates.description: Distinct customers who transacted each month.
examples: How many customers are active each month?
templates.sql:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', t.created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(DISTINCT a.customer_id) AS active_customers
FROM fin.transactions t
JOIN fin.accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
WHERE t.is_deleted = false
  AND t.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
LIMIT 36
templates.summary_hint: Describe the trend in monthly active customers.
